description: Curate a carousel layout from a CSV of contents, allowing for the selection of specific content and images for each slot, and including an optional comment.

parameters.name: content_csv_file_path
parameters.semantic: The file path to the CSV file containing the content information
parameters.source_hint: CSV file uploaded by the operator

parameters.name: slot_1_content_id
parameters.semantic: The ID of the content to be displayed in slot 1

parameters.name: slot_1_image_file_path
parameters.semantic: The file path to the image to be displayed in slot 1
parameters.source_hint: Image file uploaded by the operator

parameters.name: slot_2_content_id
parameters.semantic: The ID of the content to be displayed in slot 2

parameters.name: slot_2_image_file_path
parameters.semantic: The file path to the image to be displayed in slot 2
parameters.source_hint: Image file uploaded by the operator

parameters.name: slot_3_content_id
parameters.semantic: The ID of the content to be displayed in slot 3

parameters.name: slot_3_image_file_path
parameters.semantic: The file path to the image to be displayed in slot 3
parameters.source_hint: Image file uploaded by the operator

parameters.name: slot_4_content_id
parameters.semantic: The ID of the content to be displayed in slot 4

parameters.name: slot_4_image_file_path
parameters.semantic: The file path to the image to be displayed in slot 4
parameters.source_hint: Image file uploaded by the operator

parameters.name: slot_5_content_id
parameters.semantic: The ID of the content to be displayed in slot 5

parameters.name: slot_5_image_file_path
parameters.semantic: The file path to the image to be displayed in slot 5
parameters.source_hint: Image file uploaded by the operator

parameters.name: carousel_comment
parameters.semantic: An optional comment to be included with the carousel layout

preconditions: The user is logged in to the sample_portal
The user has the necessary permissions to curate a carousel layout

success_assertions.text: A carousel layout has been successfully curated
The carousel layout includes the selected content and images
The carousel layout has been saved and applied
